rationale.1: Citation-dense opening — section start (มาตรา ๒ onward), exercises citation-ID extraction on multiple consecutive section headings
rationale.11: Cross-reference-dense — body content with a numbered list (๑)-(๗) and a list of cross-references to many other sections; stress test for citation extraction
rationale.16: Structural transition — start of หมวด ๓ สิทธิของเจ้าของข้อมูลส่วนบุคคล (Chapter 3) + opening section มาตรา ๓๐; tests preservation of chapter headings
rationale.39: Penalty section (มาตรา ๘๓) with another dense list of cross-referenced section numbers; reading-order + citation stress
rationale.42: Closing page — มาตรา ๙๖ + royal countersignature block (พลเอก ประยุทธ์ จันทร์โอชา); short, structurally distinct from body prose

notes: Pages are 0-indexed in PyMuPDF order. The Thai reader (project author) confirms section presence on each page when populating expected_citation_ids.json.
